# Docs Site (mdBook skeleton) Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Stand up an mdBook documentation site skeleton — full nav tree plus a one-paragraph stub per page — for Ferrum developers, separate from the auto-generated OpenAPI/Swagger UI.

**Architecture:** New top-level `book/` directory. `book.toml` config + `src/SUMMARY.md` nav tree + one markdown stub per page across four sections (Getting Started, Concepts, Guides, Reference). Static output via `mdbook build`, gitignored. No prose, theme, search, deploy, or binary coupling in v1.

**Tech Stack:** mdBook v0.5.2 (already installed at `~/.cargo/bin/mdbook`), markdown.

---

## File Structure

- Create: `book/book.toml` — mdBook config (title, repo link, default theme)
- Create: `book/src/SUMMARY.md` — nav tree; mdBook generates pages from this
- Create: `book/src/introduction.md`
- Create: `book/src/getting-started/{installation,first-run,first-content-type}.md`
- Create: `book/src/concepts/{content-types,fields,components,relations,draft-publish,single-types}.md`
- Create: `book/src/guides/{schema-as-code,media-storage,api-tokens,roles,webhooks,write-hooks,import-export,graphql}.md`
- Create: `book/src/reference/{rest-api,graphql,env-vars,openapi}.md`
- Modify: `.gitignore` — add `/book/book` (build output)

Each stub page = H1 (title) + one scope paragraph ending with `<!-- TODO: fill -->`. Stubs describe scope only; no asserted behavior/flags/endpoints.

---

### Task 1: Gitignore build output

**Files:**
- Modify: `.gitignore`

- [ ] **Step 1: Append build-output ignore**

Add this line to the end of `.gitignore`:

```
/book/book
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Verify**

Run: `tail -1 .gitignore`
Expected: `/book/book`

- [ ] **Step 3: Commit**

```bash
git add .gitignore
git commit -m "chore: gitignore mdBook build output"
```

---

### Task 2: mdBook config

**Files:**
- Create: `book/book.toml`

- [ ] **Step 1: Write config**

Create `book/book.toml`:

```toml
[book]
title = "Ferrum"
description = "Headless CMS framework in Rust — developer documentation"
authors = ["Ferrum contributors"]
language = "en"
src = "src"

[output.html]
git-repository-url = "https://github.com/rinnguyen711/ferrum"
default-theme = "light"
preferred-dark-theme = "navy"
```

No commit yet — `book.toml` is committed together with the source in Task 3 Step 6 so the build can verify first.

---

### Task 3: Nav tree + all stub pages

mdBook requires every `SUMMARY.md` entry to resolve to a file, and `mdbook build` warns on entries with no file. Create `SUMMARY.md` and all referenced pages together so the build is clean.

**Files:**
- Create: `book/src/SUMMARY.md`
- Create: all 21 page files listed below

- [ ] **Step 1: Write SUMMARY.md**

Create `book/src/SUMMARY.md`:

```markdown
# Summary

[Introduction](introduction.md)

# Getting Started

- [Installation](getting-started/installation.md)
- [First-run setup](getting-started/first-run.md)
- [Your first content type](getting-started/first-content-type.md)

# Core Concepts

- [Content types](concepts/content-types.md)
- [Fields & field kinds](concepts/fields.md)
- [Components](concepts/components.md)
- [Relations](concepts/relations.md)
- [Draft & publish](concepts/draft-publish.md)
- [Single types](concepts/single-types.md)

# Guides

- [Schema as code](guides/schema-as-code.md)
- [Media storage](guides/media-storage.md)
- [API tokens](guides/api-tokens.md)
- [Roles & permissions](guides/roles.md)
- [Webhooks](guides/webhooks.md)
- [Write hooks](guides/write-hooks.md)
- [Import & export](guides/import-export.md)
- [GraphQL](guides/graphql.md)

# Reference

- [REST API](reference/rest-api.md)
- [GraphQL surface](reference/graphql.md)
- [Environment variables](reference/env-vars.md)
- [OpenAPI / Swagger](reference/openapi.md)
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Write all stub pages**

Create each file below with the exact content shown. All stubs end with `<!-- TODO: fill -->`.

`book/src/introduction.md`:
```markdown
# Introduction

Ferrum is a headless CMS framework written in Rust (Axum + sqlx) with a React + TypeScript admin UI. This documentation covers installing Ferrum, the core concepts behind its content model, and task-oriented guides for building with it. For the auto-generated, schema-aware REST reference, see the live Swagger UI at `/docs` on a running server. <!-- TODO: fill -->
```

`book/src/getting-started/installation.md`:
```markdown
# Installation

How to get a Ferrum server running — the Docker Compose quickstart for a one-command demo, and the cargo workflow for running the backend against your own Postgres. Covers prerequisites and the optional admin UI bundle. <!-- TODO: fill -->
```

`book/src/getting-started/first-run.md`:
```markdown
# First-run setup

Bootstrapping a fresh install: creating the initial admin account, logging in to obtain a JWT, and sending authenticated requests. <!-- TODO: fill -->
```

# Single types

Single types model one-off content (such as a homepage or global settings) that has exactly one entry rather than a collection. <!-- TODO: fill -->

- [ ] **Step 3: Build to verify no broken links**

Run: `cd book && mdbook build 2>&1`
Expected: build succeeds, exits 0, no `[WARN]` lines about missing files. Output written to `book/book/`.

- [ ] **Step 4: Verify every SUMMARY entry resolved**

Run: `cd book && mdbook build 2>&1 | grep -i warn || echo "NO WARNINGS"`
Expected: `NO WARNINGS`

- [ ] **Step 5: Confirm build output is gitignored**

Run: `git status --porcelain book/book | head -1`
Expected: empty (no output) — `book/book/` is ignored.

- [ ] **Step 6: Commit config + source**

```bash
git add book/book.toml book/src
git commit -m "docs: add mdBook docs-site skeleton"
```

- Location `book/` sibling — all paths under `book/`. ✓
- Structure (21 pages across 4 sections) — Task 3 SUMMARY + pages match spec tree exactly. ✓
- One-paragraph stub + `<!-- TODO: fill -->` per page — Task 3 Step 2. ✓
- Build `mdbook build` → `book/book/`, gitignored — Task 1 + Task 3 Steps 3-5. ✓
- Verification (build clean, no broken links, every page in SUMMARY) — Task 3 Steps 3-4. ✓

**Placeholder scan:** `<!-- TODO: fill -->` markers are intentional spec'd content, not plan placeholders. No plan-level TBD/TODO. ✓

**Type consistency:** Paths in SUMMARY.md (Task 3 Step 1) match the files created in Step 2 one-for-one and match the File Structure section. ✓
